---
title: "Imke Tomsin" 
subtitle: "PhD student - FWO fundamental research fellow"
page-layout: full
image: images/test.jpg # Use same image as the card on people.qmd
about:
  template: trestles # Places photo/links in a left sidebar
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:imke.tomsin@uhasselt.be
---
